title: Bump github.com/containers/storage to v1.12.7
body: This is mainly about picking up a recent locking fix, as in #3149.

comments.body: 1.3 is largely maintained for RHEL builds at this point, and it's a little late to get anything into 7.6.5 (we'll be shipping 1.4 for 7.7, ideally).

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *nalind*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.3/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
